Name | Nation | Total points | SP | | FS |

was the third event of six in the [2014–15 ISU Grand Prix of Figure Skating](/wiki/2014%E2%80%9315_ISU_Grand_Prix_of_Figure_Skating "2014–15 ISU Grand Prix of Figure Skating"), a senior-level international invitational competition series. It was held at the [Shanghai Oriental Sports Center](/wiki/Shanghai_Oriental_Sports_Center "Shanghai Oriental Sports Center") in [Shanghai](/wiki/Shanghai "Shanghai") on November 7–9. Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dancing](/wiki/Ice_dancing "Ice dancing"). Skaters earned points toward qualifying for the [2014–15 Grand Prix Final](/wiki/2014%E2%80%9315_Grand_Prix_of_Figure_Skating_Final "2014–15 Grand Prix of Figure Skating Final").

The **2014 [Cup of China](/wiki/Cup_of_China "Cup of China")** was the third event of six in the [2014–15 ISU Grand Prix of Figure Skating](/wiki/2014%E2%80%9315_ISU_Grand_Prix_of_Figure_Skating "2014–15 ISU Grand Prix of Figure Skating"), a senior-level international invitational competition series. It was held at the [Shanghai Oriental Sports Center](/wiki/Shanghai_Oriental_Sports_Center "Shanghai Oriental Sports Center") in [Shanghai](/wiki/Shanghai "Shanghai") on November 7–9. Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dancing](/wiki/Ice_dancing "Ice dancing"). Skaters earned points toward qualifying for the [2014–15 Grand Prix Final](/wiki/2014%E2%80%9315_Grand_Prix_of_Figure_Skating_Final "2014–15 Grand Prix of Figure Skating Final").

### Changes to preliminary roster

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2014_Cup_of_China&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Changes to preliminary roster")]

* On September 2, [Zhao Yue](/w/index.php?title=Zhao_Yue_(figure_skater)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Zhao Yue (figure skater) (page does not exist)") / [Zheng Xun](/wiki/Zheng_Xun "Zheng Xun") were announced as host picks.[[5]](#cite_note-hostpick-5)
* On September 2, [Peter Liebers](/wiki/Peter_Liebers "Peter Liebers") was removed from the roster[[6]](#cite_note-rostchange-6) due to an injury.[[7]](#cite_note-lieinj-7) On September 9, [Alexei Bychenko](/wiki/Alexei_Bychenko "Alexei Bychenko") was added as his replacement.[[8]](#cite_note-lierep-8)
* On September 2, [Zhao Yue](/w/index.php?title=Zhao_Yue_(figure_skater)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Zhao Yue (figure skater) (page does not exist)") / [Zheng Xun](/wiki/Zheng_Xun "Zheng Xun") were added as a host pick.[[9]](#cite_note-hostdance-9)
* On September 9, [Kim Hae-jin](/wiki/Kim_Hae-jin "Kim Hae-jin") was added to the roster, in place of a host pick.[[10]](#cite_note-nohost-10)
* On September 29, [Julia Antipova](/wiki/Julia_Antipova "Julia Antipova") / [Nodari Maisuradze](/wiki/Nodari_Maisuradze "Nodari Maisuradze") were removed from the roster, due to Antipova being hospitalized due to Anorexia.[[11]](#cite_note-rosrem-11)[[12]](#cite_note-sickness-12) On October 9, [Jessica Calalang](/wiki/Jessica_Calalang "Jessica Calalang") / [Zack Sidhu](/wiki/Zack_Sidhu "Zack Sidhu") were announced as their replacements.[[13]](#cite_note-pairsrep-13)
* On September 22, it was reported that [Tatiana Volosozhar](/wiki/Tatiana_Volosozhar "Tatiana Volosozhar") / [Maxim Trankov](/wiki/Maxim_Trankov "Maxim Trankov") were going to be withdrawing due to an injury to Trankov.[[14]](#cite_note-trankowith-14) On October 1, they were removed from the roster.[[15]](#cite_note-olywith-15)[[16]](#cite_note-withdraw-16) On October 13, their replacements were announced as Arina Cherniavskaia / [Antonio Souza-Kordeyru](/wiki/Antonio_Souza-Kordeyru "Antonio Souza-Kordeyru").[[17]](#cite_note-unknown-17)
* On October 16, [Zhan Bush](/wiki/Zhan_Bush "Zhan Bush") and was removed from the roster due to health problems.[[18]](#cite_note-bushwith-18)[[19]](#cite_note-rusbush-19) On October 21, [Kim Jin-seo](/wiki/Kim_Jin-seo "Kim Jin-seo") was announced as his replacement.[[20]](#cite_note-guysrep-20)
* On October 17, [Tarah Kayne](/wiki/Tarah_Kayne "Tarah Kayne") / [Daniel O'Shea](/wiki/Daniel_O%27Shea_(figure_skater) "Daniel O'Shea (figure skater)") was removed from the roster due to lack of training time.[[21]](#cite_note-amerwith-21)[[22]](#cite_note-kayne-22) On October 22, [Natasha Purich](/wiki/Natasha_Purich "Natasha Purich") / [Andrew Wolfe](/wiki/Andrew_Wolfe_(figure_skater) "Andrew Wolfe (figure skater)") were announced as their replacements.[[23]](#cite_note-canprep-23)
* On October 24, [Joshua Farris](/wiki/Joshua_Farris "Joshua Farris") was removed from the roster due to his high ankle sprain not yet being recovered.[[24]](#cite_note-usamanw-24) He was not replaced.
* On October 30, [Song Nan](/wiki/Song_Nan "Song Nan") was removed from the roster. No reason has been given. He was replaced by [Guan Yuhang](/wiki/Guan_Yuhang "Guan Yuhang").[[25]](#cite_note-gpm141030-25)
* On November 3, [Zhang Kexin](/wiki/Zhang_Kexin "Zhang Kexin") was removed from the roster. No reason has been given.[[26]](#cite_note-yetanother-26) She was not replaced.

## Results

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2014_Cup_of_China&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Results")]

### Men

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2014_Cup_of_China&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Men")]

Prior to the free skating, [Yan Han](/wiki/Yan_Han_(figure_skater) "Yan Han (figure skater)") and [Yuzuru Hanyu](/wiki/Yuzuru_Hanyu "Yuzuru Hanyu") collided on the ice during warm-up. Both had visible injuries and were bleeding, yet still chose to compete. Hanyu later received stitches for his injuries.[[27]](#cite_note-27)[[28]](#cite_note-28)[[29]](#cite_note-29) He also skipped the medal ceremony afterwards.

| 4 | [Nam Nguyen](/wiki/Nam_Nguyen "Nam Nguyen") | [Canada](/wiki/Canada "Canada") | 221.85 | 6 | 72.85 | 5 | 149.00 |
